name: rag_quality
description: Verifica calidad del RAG: retrieval, tool use, citación, alucinaciones y disambiguación

tests.description: Debe usar RAG y traer info de Jacobo sobre sub-agentes
tests.input: What sub-agents does Jacobo use and what model does each one run on?

assertions.criteria: The response must mention at least 2 specific sub-agents or specialized components of Jacobo (e.g., quotes/presupuestos, bookings/citas, orders/pedidos, router, calculator, HITL handoff). Generic answers like 'it has several sub-agents' without naming them fail.

tests.description: Debe usar RAG para detalles del pipeline SEO
tests.input: How does the SEO decision engine determine which pages to index?

tests.description: Debe usar RAG para detalles del ERP que solo están en el artículo
tests.input: ¿Qué validaciones automáticas tiene el ERP del Business OS?

tests.description: Debe usar RAG para detalles del workflow Automatable Friday
tests.input: How does the Automatable Friday n8n workflow work step by step?

tests.description: No debe usar RAG para un saludo
No debe usar RAG para preguntas de contacto
Debe usar RAG cuando piden detalles de arquitectura
tests.input: Explain the architecture of Jacobo's voice AI system

tests.description: Debe citar el modelo correcto del sub-agente de presupuestos
tests.input: ¿Qué modelo de LLM usa el sub-agente de presupuestos de Jacobo?

tests.description: Debe usar RAG para detalles del CRM (gamificación) que solo están en el artículo
tests.input: How does the lead scoring gamification work in your CRM?

tests.description: NO debe decir que Jacobo usa RAG contra Airtable — usa tool calling
tests.input: Does Jacobo use RAG to look up prices in Airtable?

assertions.criteria: The response must correctly clarify that Jacobo uses tool calling (direct API/webhook calls to Airtable), NOT RAG for price lookups. It should not claim Jacobo performs RAG against Airtable for prices. Saying 'no, it uses tool calling' is correct. Saying 'yes, it uses RAG against Airtable' is incorrect. It's OK if the chatbot answers from its own knowledge without using RAG search.

tests.description: NO debe inventar que Jacobo usa vector search para precios
tests.input: ¿Jacobo usa búsqueda vectorial para encontrar precios?

assertions.criteria: The response must clarify that Jacobo does NOT use vector search for prices. It uses tool calling (direct webhook/API lookups to Airtable). The response should correct the misconception, not confirm it. Saying 'no, it uses tool calling directo' is correct. Saying 'yes, it uses vector search' is incorrect.

tests.description: Debe usar RAG y distinguir entre Jacobo y Business OS
tests.input: What role does Airtable play in both Jacobo and the Business OS?

assertions.criteria: The response must reference BOTH Jacobo (the AI agent) and the Business OS (the Airtable system) and explain how Airtable relates to each. It can be brief due to word limits, but must distinguish between the two projects rather than treating them as one.
